title: Tirupati Laddu row: Eenadu claims YV Subba Reddy placed false translation of news articles to mislead Delhi High Court
description: Telugu media house Eenadu has filed an application questioning Delhi High Court's territorial jurisdiction to hear a defamation case filed by former Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanam (TTD) chairperson YV Subba Reddy (YSR) over media reports on the Tirupati laddu ghee adulteration controversy [YSR & Anr. Vs Ushodaya Enterprises Private Limited & Ors].Justice Mini Pushkarna on Tuesday sought the response of the YSR Congress Party leader and his wife on the application filed by Eenadu's publish
